caption:
Tag your IG besties! 👯‍♀️💗

This is the cutest DSS pop up event! Melt Ice Cream Museum inside Modhesh World is a must-visit if you’re a fan ice cream and colorful photo backdrops. 🍦📸

🎟️ Free entry
🍦There are ice cream stalls. Not free but you can buy whatever you fancy- gelato, popsicles, soft serves, and more.
📍 Dubai World Trade Centre
🗓️ Until August 27, 2023 only
